examples: Tom struggled awhile and then retired, utterly defeated.
I'll let you chew it awhile, but you must give it back to me.
Joe harassed him awhile, and then he got away and crossed back again.
Here in the mountains, where every sunrise starts, I'll heal my heart for awhile.
Tadoussac offers alot besides leviathans, so book into the landmark 1870 Hotel Tadoussac and stay awhile.
